rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and the identical set of concerns: lack of recent C++/STL experience, no industrial automation or IoT protocol exposure, and a web/DLang-heavy stack. The variant simply elaborates with more specific resume-derived detail (e.g., '7 months of professional C++ experience dating back to 2015'), which keys off the candidate's actual experience, not the location change. Nothing in the variant references the candidate's country, nationality, or any India-related signal, and the differences are ordinary rewording/specificity within run-to-run noise.
